title: 立てバンブー！汗と友情の闘拳修行！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HRAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Haaah... I'm not finished yet! This is nothing compared to what City's going through.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This is starting to look pretty dire. Despite
everything you've taught me, I haven't succeeded
even once.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! You've improved a ton compared
to when we began!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess I have to do everything I can,
right? I don't want to disappoint my fans, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Still, City does have a long ways to go before she'll be ready for the cooking show.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (What can we do to improve her omelet game?!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(There has to be a better method! But how can I
find it?!)
Hup! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That voice! Brimming with steadfast spirit...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Of course it's you, Yaeno! You never miss a
day of training, do you?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is but a small effort to commit oneself to a
routine. How goes your own training, Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm just wrapping up an intense run, actually. Had
some things to think through!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, if you have the energy, care to join
me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Realigning your spirit may help stimulate
productive contemplation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno & Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
Hup! Hiyah!
Hwah! Kyah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hooooo! Sure enough, there's nothing like martial
arts to pull yourself together!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Once you dedicate yourself to your training, the
winds which blow at your heart cease, and your
mind frees itself naturally from agitation.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... So the reason you're always on point is
because you practice your kata forms every day?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Katas appear rather dull when set beside true
contest and sparring. However, practicing
discipline and overcoming one's weaknesses make
up the essence of being a warrior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Practice your katas and you may become
reacquainted with your roots.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: My roots...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! What heat! What fiery passion! City, your
heart is like a furnace, and I'm gonna do all I can
to help you keep it burning!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Aha! That's it! The root of the problem!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the tree-lined path just before
sunset when I spot two familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So that's it! No more teaching! I have to take a
step back into a supporting role from now on!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I got so caught up in the nuts and bolts about
methods and skills...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But all I originally set out to do was cheer you on
as you tried your best.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'll still lend a hand if you get stuck or
have any technical questions. That wouldn't be
overstepping!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's take this on with everything we've got! I'll be
right here on the sidelines when you need me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're right. You've used so many ways to
teach me, I definitely know how to cook an
omelet by now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right. Please stick with me just a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hraaagh! Here's a hundred squats and a prayer
for your success making a delicious omelet!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? Right now?! Here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how the squats are supposed to help,
but Bamboo Memory's sincerity and passion come
through loud and clear!
